service.name: Linear API
service.description_for_ai: Modern issue tracker loved by engineering teams. Issues, projects, cycles (sprints), roadmaps, automations. GraphQL API. Used by Vercel, Retool, Loom. Fast and developer-friendly.

capabilities.description_for_ai: List Linear issues with filters by team, status, assignee, priority. Uses GraphQL.

query.description: GraphQL query: {issues(filter: {state: {name: {eq: "In Progress"}}, assignee: {email: {eq: "me@example.com"}}}) {nodes {id title state {name} priority assignee {name} createdAt url}}}

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a new Linear issue with title, description, team, priority, and assignee.

query.description: GraphQL mutation: mutation { issueCreate(input: {title: "Bug title", description: "Details", teamId: "TEAM_ID", priority: 2, assigneeId: "USER_ID", labelIds: ["LABEL_ID"]}) { success issue { id url } } }

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get all Linear teams in the workspace with their states and members.

query.description: GraphQL query: {teams {nodes {id name key states {nodes {id name type}} members {nodes {id name email}}}}}

capabilities.description_for_ai: Update a Linear issue: change status, priority, assignee, or add comment.

query.description: GraphQL mutation: mutation { issueUpdate(id: "ISSUE_ID", input: {stateId: "STATE_ID", priority: 1, assigneeId: "USER_ID"}) { success issue { id state { name } } } }

agent_hints.graphql: Linear uses GraphQL only. All queries and mutations go to same endpoint.
